new_translation: Liên Hợp Quốc đã gửi phái viên đặc biệt để hòa giải đàm phán.

old_example: The company is committed to promoting gender equality in the workplace by ensuring that men and women receive equal pay for the same professional roles.
new_example: The company is committed to promoting gender equality in the workplace.
new_translation: Công ty cam kết thúc đẩy bình đẳng giới tại nơi làm việc.

old_example: Countries located near the equator typically experience a tropical climate with high temperatures and significant rainfall throughout the entire year.
new_example: Countries near the equator typically experience a tropical climate with high temperatures.
new_translation: Các quốc gia gần xích đạo thường có khí hậu nhiệt đới nóng.

old_example: The scientist carefully adjusted the pressure in the reaction chamber to equilibrate the system before adding the volatile chemical compounds.
new_example: The scientist adjusted the pressure to equilibrate the system.
new_translation: Nhà khoa học đã điều chỉnh áp suất để làm cân bằng hệ thống.

old_example: The new fitness center is equipped with the latest high-tech gym equipment, including treadmills with integrated entertainment screens.
new_example: The new fitness center is equipped with high-tech gym equipment.
new_translation: Trung tâm thể dục mới được trang bị thiết bị gym công nghệ cao.

old_example: The discovery of the steam engine marked the beginning of a new industrial era that transformed the way products were manufactured and transported.
new_example: The steam engine marked the beginning of a new industrial era.
new_translation: Động cơ hơi nước đánh dấu sự khởi đầu của kỷ nguyên công nghiệp mới.

old_example: The global health organization aims to eradicate the deadly virus within the next decade through a massive and coordinated international vaccination campaign.
new_example: The organization aims to eradicate the virus through a vaccination campaign.
new_translation: Tổ chức đặt mục tiêu diệt trừ vi-rút qua chiến dịch tiêm chủng.

old_example: The history museum features several interactive exhibits that explore the major political and social changes across different eras of human civilization.
new_example: The museum features exhibits that explore changes across different eras.
new_translation: Bảo tàng có các hiện vật khám phá những thay đổi qua các thời đại.

old_example: She prefers using erasable pens when working on crossword puzzles so she can easily correct any mistakes.
new_example: She prefers using erasable pens when working on crossword puzzles.
new_translation: Cô ấy thích sử dụng bút có thể xóa khi làm các câu đố ô chữ.

old_example: Investing in ergonomic office furniture can help prevent back pain and increase employee productivity.
new_example: Investing in ergonomic office furniture can help prevent back pain.
new_translation: Đầu tư vào đồ nội thất tiện dụng giúp ngăn ngừa đau lưng.

old_example: I'll be back in an hour, I just have a few errands to run.
new_example: I will be back in an hour after running a few errands.
new_translation: Tôi sẽ quay lại sau một tiếng sau khi làm vài việc lặt vặt.

old_example: The car began to drive erratically across the road, causing other motorists to slow down and pull over to avoid a potential accident.
new_example: The car began to drive erratically across the road.
new_translation: Chiếc xe bắt đầu lái một cách thất thường trên đường.

old_example: The company is concerned about the escalating costs of raw materials in the global market.
new_example: The company is concerned about the escalating costs of raw materials.
new_translation: Công ty lo ngại về chi phí nguyên vật liệu đang leo thang.

old_example: The shopping mall features several sets of escalators to move large crowds of people between floors quickly.
new_example: The mall features several sets of escalators to move crowds quickly.
new_translation: Trung tâm có vài bộ thang cuốn để di chuyển đám đông nhanh.

old_example: The fire escape is located at the end of the hallway for use in emergencies.
new_example: The fire escape is located at the end of the hallway.
new_translation: Lối thoát hiểm hỏa hoạn nằm ở cuối hành lang.
